---
title: "Notes"
description: "Fragments du quotidien — découvertes, observations de terrain, lectures, réflexions."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [date, title, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
